# Stay Updated   And Be The First To Know!

Subscribe to access exclusive resources and on workforce development opportunities.

![](https://www.waf.org.sg/ui/frontend/assets/img/membershipBnrImg.png)

## Subscribe Now

### Corporate Profile

- Industry Classification \* Administrative & Support Service ActivitiesAerospaceAgriculture & FishingArts, Entertainment & RecreationAutomobile Distribution & ServicesCleaningCommunity & Social ServicesConstructionCreativeEducationElectricity, Gas, Steam & Air-Conditioning SupplyFinancial & InsuranceFloricultureFood & BeverageGeneric ManufacturingHealthcareHotel & TourismHuman ResourceInformation & Communications TechnologyLandscapingMarineMining & QuarryingPest ManagementPharmaceuticalPrecision EngineeringProcess & PackagingProfessional, Scientific & Technical ActivitiesPublic Administration & DefenceReal EstateRetailSecurityShippingSpa & WellnessTextiles & FashionTrainingTransportation & StorageWaste ManagementWater Supply & TreatmentWholesale & DistributionOthers


All (\*) mandatory fields.

### Business Owner/ Managing Director/ Chief Executive Officer

- Salutation \* MrMrsMissMsMdmDr.Prof.


All (\*) mandatory fields.

### Company Representative 2 (Optional)

- Salutation \* MrMrsMissMsMdmDr.Prof.


All (\*) mandatory fields.

### Company Representative 3 (Optional)

- Salutation \* MrMrsMissMsMdmDr.Prof.


All (\*) mandatory fields.

By submitting this subscription form, you consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal data provided in this form by Workforce Advancement Federation(WAF), in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (the "PDPA"), for the following purposes:\*

1. Processing your subscription application;
2. Administering your subscription with WAF;
3. Sending you marketing materials, including but not limited to newsletters and other communications, to keep you informed about WAF’s initiatives, programmes, events, and industry updates;
4. Subject to your separate consent below, WAF may provide you with information regarding business partners’ products and services, via the channels you have selected below.
5. Subject to your separate consent below, WAF’s business partners may provide you with information directly regarding their products and services, including updates on their latest promotions and new offerings, via the channels you have selected below;

You acknowledge and agree that you will comply with the provisions of the PDPA in relation to any personal data you may hold and process as a subscribed member of WAF. You agree to indemnify WAF against any claims or damages that may arise from your failure to comply with the PDPA in relation to such data.\*

I consent to receive information from WAF regarding their business partners’ products and services as described in point (d) above, via the following channels: \[List Channels - e.g., Email, Whatsapp Messages, Post\]\*

I consent to receive information direct from WAF’s business partners regarding their products and services as described in point (e) above, via the following channels: \[List Channels - e.g., Email, Whatsapp Messages, Post\]\*

reCAPTCHA

reCAPTCHA

Submit

**Note:** Workforce Advancement Federation Ltd (WAF) manages personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2012 ("the Act"). By submitting this form, you have agreed and provided consent to WAF as well as our respective representatives in collecting, using, disclosing and sharing amongst themselves your Personal Data, and disclosing such Personal Data to WAF's authorised service providers and relevant third parties which will be strictly for B2B activities in fulfilling the objectives of WAF. In accordance with the PDPA, you may exercise your right to access, modify or delete your registered records collected by WAF. We maintain an opt-out function in all emails and direct mails disseminated. Should you wish to understand further on the above, please contact us at [membership@waf.org.sg](mailto:membership@waf.org.sg).

[Subscribe Now](https://www.waf.org.sg/subscription)

By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy and provide consent to receive updates from our federation.
